title: Library of Congress: Great Depression and New Deal Sources
description: A LOC source card for Great Depression and New Deal primary sources.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress Great Depression and New Deal materials feature photographs, government documents, posters, songs, and accounts of economic hardship and response.
Use this source for interpreting visual evidence, connecting economics with lived experience, and comparing policy choices across communities.
Library of Congress item pages provide rights statements. Confirm the rights status of photographs, recordings, and documents before reuse.
